# Product Tower Kit

> Vietnamese-first, ADHD-friendly product management toolkit for Claude Code. 14-tier framework with anti-bias enforcement, PMF gate system, and 5 specialized agents.

## Quick Links

- [Quickstart Guide](docs/quickstart.md)
- [Project Overview & PDR](docs/project-overview-pdr.md)
- [System Architecture](docs/system-architecture.md)
- [Code Standards](docs/code-standards.md)
- [Codebase Summary](docs/codebase-summary.md)
- [Ecosystem Map](resources/ecosystem-map.md)

## Install

```bash
npx product-tower-kit init
# or
npm install -g product-tower-kit && product-tower init
```

## The Tower

```
T14: Feedback Loop        ← MEASURE & ITERATE
T13: QA / Validation      ← BUILD
T12: Development
T11: UI Design            ← DESIGN
T10: UX Design
T9.5: Offer Bridge        ← OFFER DESIGN
T9: User Stories           ← PRODUCT
T8: Feature Set
T7: PMF Validation         ← STRATEGY (HARD GATE ≥30/50)
───────────────────────────
🔴 ANTI-BIAS LAYER         ← ENFORCEMENT
AB1: Counter-Search
AB2: Red Team
AB3: Field Observation
AB4: User Interview
AB5: Strategic Analysis
AB6: Founder Insight
───────────────────────────
T6: Unmet Needs            ← DISCOVERY
T5: User Needs
T4: User Personas
T3: Segment Filter         ← FOUNDATION
T2: Market Segmentation
T1: Target Market
T0: Market Research         ← DATA
```

## CLI Commands

```bash
product-tower init              # Initialize project
product-tower check T1          # Check gate
product-tower complete T0       # Mark complete
product-tower pmf 44 -4         # Set PMF score
product-tower status            # Show status
product-tower assess            # Quick health check
product-tower naming            # Show naming convention
```

## Claude Code Commands

```
/pt:init                        # Initialize project
/pt:research [topic]            # Run T0 market research
/pt:validate PMF                # Run T7 PMF validation
/pt:scope features              # Run T8-T9 feature scoping
/pt:assess                      # Quick health check
/pt:status                      # Show pipeline status
/pt:report                      # Generate full report
```

## Skills (12)

| Skill | Tiers | Purpose |
|-------|-------|---------|
| product-tower | ALL | Master orchestrator |
| market-research | T0 | Data collection |
| market-segmentation | T1-T3 | Segment targeting |
| user-discovery | T4-T6 | Persona + needs |
| pmf-validator | T7 | PMF gate |
| pricing-strategy | T9.5 | Offer design |
| competitor-analysis | T0-CP | Competitive map |
| deep-research-parser | Pre-T0 | Parse deep research |
| analytics-feedback | T14 | Feedback loop |
| delivery-tower | D1-D6 | GTM + launch |
| sales-tower | S0-S9 | Hormozi framework |
| product-sale | P0-P10 | Unified BUILD+SELL |

## Agents (5)

| Agent | Role | Mode |
|-------|------|------|
| product-planner | Tier progression | Sequential |
| market-researcher | Data collection | Parallel |
| anti-bias-challenger | AB1-AB6 enforcement | Adversarial |
| pmf-validator | PMF scoring | Analytical |
| feature-scoper | Feature scoping | Collaborative |

## Gate System

```
T-1 → T0 → T1 → T2 → T3 → T4 → T5 → T6
                ↓
              AB1 → AB2 → AB3 → AB4 → AB5/AB6
                ↓
              T7 (PMF Gate: ≥30/50)
                ↓
              T8 → T9 → T9.5 → T14
```

## PMF Scoring

| Anti-Bias Status | Penalty |
|------------------|--------:|
| Desk-only (no AB) | -10 |
| +AB1 only | -5 |
| +AB1+AB2 | -2.5 |
| Full AB (AB1-AB4) | 0 |
| +AB5 | +0.5 |
| +AB6 | +1.5 |

Threshold: ≥30/50 = GO

## Confidence Tagging

| Tag | Score | Source |
|-----|-------|--------|
| 🤖 | 60% | AI-generated |
| 📊 | 80% | Cited data |
| 👤 | 90% | User interview |
| ✅ | 95% | Validated |

## Pricing

| Tier | Price | Includes |
|------|-------|----------|
| Starter | $49 | Core skills (T0-T7), gate checker, basic templates |
| Pro | $99 | All skills (T0-T14), agents, hooks, advanced templates |
| Team | $199 | Pro + multi-project, team collaboration, priority support |

## Documentation

- [Project Overview & PDR](docs/project-overview-pdr.md): Project identity, target audience, problem statement, solution, pricing, success metrics, timeline
- [Codebase Summary](docs/codebase-summary.md): LOC breakdown, directory structure, 3-language stack, 6 systems, dependencies
- [Code Standards](docs/code-standards.md): File naming conventions, SKILL.md format, agent format, Python/PowerShell/Node.js standards
- [System Architecture](docs/system-architecture.md): Architecture diagram, gate system design, PMF scoring, data flow, integration points
- [Quickstart Guide](docs/quickstart.md): Installation, initialization, step-by-step workflow, CLI commands
- [Ecosystem Map](resources/ecosystem-map.md): Skill-agent-tier routing, master orchestration chain
